posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to share some exciting updates about our MasterPlan Calendar app!

  1. Export Calendar to PDF: You can now easily export your calendar to a PDF file for simple sharing and printing of your schedules - Day, Week, Month and List views.

    Screenshot 2024-12-09 at 0.34.17402×518 19.1 KB

  2. Event Info Box: We’ve added a convenient info box that appears when you hover over to top of the event, providing quick access to important details.

    Screenshot 2024-12-09 at 0.26.22548×804 114 KB

  3. Design Updates: Refreshed look, making your calendar even clearer

  4. Performance Enhancements: We’ve implemented several performance enhancements to ensure your experience is smoother and faster than ever.

Try it now and experience the best calendar on monday -https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000472/masterplan-calendar
